description: Sample parsed representation of The New Stack RSS feed item (https://thenewstack.io/feed/).

items.title: Inside OpenSearch's bid to become the default AI data layer
items.author: Anil Inamdar
items.description: OpenSearch is positioning itself as a foundational AI data layer with support for vector search, MCP integration, and hybrid retrieval patterns.

items.title: "Like taking your Ferrari to buy milk": IBM's Neel Sundaresan on the case for Bob
items.author: Darryl K. Taft
items.description: IBM's Neel Sundaresan explains the design philosophy behind Bob, a lightweight agentic coding tool optimized for focused development tasks.
